name: Rank One Computing Corp
business: ROC sells a Vision AI platform that delivers real-time facial recognition, multimodal biometric verification, video analytics, and AI-powered evidence analysis to law enforcement, defense, and regulated commercial sectors. Product lines include ROC SDK, ROC ABIS, ROC Watch, and ROC Enroll.

exposures.sentence: Our Vision AI platform delivers real-time facial recognition, multimodal biometric verification, video analytics, and AI-powered evidence analysis to mission-critical organizations across private and public sectors.
Our software can run on smaller, lower-power devices including mobile systems and edge appliances without sacrificing performance.
As demand for trusted AI accelerates across law enforcement, defense, and regulated commercial sectors, ROC is scaling rapidly through a growing network of integrators and multi-year deals.
ROC SDK is widely used within Public Security, National Security, and Fintech use-cases.
ROC Enroll is widely used by MTN (telecom) in South Africa for SIM card registration.

tamClaims.claim: The total addressable market in 2025 for ROC products and services, collectively, was approximately $106 billion, globally: Vision AI: $23.7 billion, Biometrics: $60.3 billion, Video Analytics: $12.3 billion, Digital Evidence: $9.4 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on market research provided by leading market researchers, including Fortune Business Insights, Straits Research, Grand View Horizon, and the Edge AI and Vision Alliance, the total addressable market in 2025 for ROC products and services, collectively, was approximately $106 billion, globally: Vision AI: $23.7 billion Biometrics: $60.3 billion Video Analytics: $12.3 billion Digital Evidence: $9.4 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The global biometrics market is predicted to increase from $60.32 billion in 2025 to approximately $307.24 billion by 2034, expanding at a CAGR of 19.89%.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, the global biometrics market reached an estimated $50.08 billion in revenue and is predicted to increase from $60.32 billion in 2025 to approximately $307.24 billion by 2034, expanding at a CAGR of 19.89% from 2025 to 2034.

tamClaims.claim: The video analytics market is projected to reach approximately $48.94 billion by 2032, growing at a 21.8% CAGR from 2025 to 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: Fortune Business Insights estimates the global market will grow at a 21.8% CAGR from 2025 to 2032, reaching $48.9 billion by 2032.
